steps.title: Extract the low temperatures from the table
steps.content: The Low temperature row shows five values across the five days: Monday 49°F, Tuesday 37°F, Wednesday 41°F, Thursday 54°F, Friday 63°F.

steps.title: Calculate the mean
steps.content: Sum all five low temperatures: $49 + 37 + 41 + 54 + 63 = 244$. Divide by 5 (the number of days): $$\frac{244}{5} = 48.8$$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
